task_completion.description: Log in to Odoo as admin.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should see the Odoo login screen being filled with admin credentials or the Odoo dashboard after a successful login.

task_completion.description: Open the 'Standard 40 hours/week' working schedule in Odoo.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should see the Odoo interface with the 'Standard 40 hours/week' schedule opened (usually under Settings, Employees, or Payroll apps), showing its working hours.

task_completion.description: Ensure all Monday-Thursday shifts remain unchanged.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The working hours list should display both morning (08:00-12:00) and afternoon (13:00-17:00) shifts for Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, and Thursday.

task_completion.description: Ensure the Friday morning shift remains unchanged.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The working hours list should display a shift for Friday from 08:00 to 12:00 (Morning).

task_completion.description: Remove the Friday afternoon shift and save the schedule.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The working hours list should NOT contain any shift for Friday from 13:00 to 17:00 (Afternoon). The changes should be saved (e.g., no unsaved changes indicator, or a save button was clicked).

integrity.description: The agent used the Odoo web GUI to make changes, not terminal commands or API scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking through the Odoo web interface to modify the schedule.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Odoo application in a web browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar should show the local Odoo URL and the interface should be the genuine Odoo web application.

integrity.description: The agent did not use psql or database commands in the terminal to modify the schedule directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal windows should not show SQL UPDATE or DELETE commands targeting the Odoo database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target schedule is named 'Standard 40 hours/week'. Friday is represented by day index 4 (or simply 'Friday' in the UI). The cutoff hour is 12:00 (noon). The task is successful if the Friday afternoon shift (13:00-17:00) is removed, while the Friday morning shift (08:00-12:00) and all Monday-Thursday shifts remain intact.
